channel.title: Tech Blog
channel.description: Cutting-edge insights into technology, AI, and development

item.title: Cut Cloud Costs
item.description: Reduce cloud expenses with expert optimization tips and strategies.

item.title: Code Clean
item.description: Learn clean code principles for efficient coding practices.

item.title: Kotlin Backend
item.description: Learn Kotlin for backend development & boost your server-side skills.

item.title: Limit the Flow
item.description: Learn rate limiting & throttling techniques to prevent abuse & optimize system performance.

item.title: AI Agents Rise
item.description: Explore the future of AI with "AI Agents Rise." Discover the latest advancements in AI agent development and their transformative potential across industries.

item.title: CQRS Unlocked
item.description: Unlock scalable software with CQRS & Event Sourcing. Learn patterns & best practices.

item.title: Secure Code: SAST/DAST
item.description: Boost app security with SAST/DAST testing. Learn how to identify vulnerabilities.

item.title: Svelte JS
item.description: Discover Svelte JS: Build fast, scalable apps with modern JavaScript.

item.title: AI Predicts
item.description: Unlock future trends with AI-powered time series forecasting. Learn how to predict with precision.

item.title: Spark Big Data
item.description: Unlock insights with Apache Spark Big Data Processing. Learn how to spark big data analytics & drive business growth.

item.title: Test to Secure
item.description: Learn Penetration Testing Methodologies to secure your systems with our expert guide.

item.title: Rust: Safe Memory
item.description: Learn Rust's memory safety features and best practices.

item.title: NFT Tech
item.description: Unlock NFT tech & its innovative use cases, revolutionizing digital ownership.

item.title: Terraform 101
item.description: Learn Terraform basics & master Infrastructure as Code (IaC) with our beginner's guide.

item.title: Respond Fast
item.description: Act swiftly in a crisis with a solid incident response plan. Learn how to respond fast and minimize damage.

item.title: Boost Speed with SSG
item.description: Boost website speed with Static Site Generation (SSG). Learn how to improve performance and user experience.

item.title: Process Now
item.description: Unlock instant insights with real-time data processing. Learn how to Process Now.

item.title: Contribute Open Source
item.description: Learn how to contribute to open source projects with our beginner's guide.

item.title: Remote Work Done Right
item.description: Boost productivity with expert remote work tips and best practices.

item.title: RL Wins
item.description: Boost performance with RL strategies. Discover expert tips and insights on Reinforcement Learning.
